method_summary: AIBuildAI-2 is a knowledge-enhanced agent with an external, evolving knowledge system for automatically building AI models, featuring a hierarchical organization of curated AI development knowledge with dynamic context loading.
key_innovation: A hierarchical, evolving knowledge system that allows the agent to dynamically load relevant context and ground decisions in externally verifiable expertise while continuously learning from its own experiences.
title: AIBuildAI-2: Scalable Agentic AI Research and Engineering
